# Software Handbook

> A handbook about Software Engineering, Data and AI

A comprehensive collection of notes about Software Engineering, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence.


## Software Engineering

- [Overview](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/index.md)
- [Abbreviations](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/abbreviations/index.md)
- [Architecture Patterns](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/architecture_patterns/index.md)
- [Basic Concepts](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/basic_concepts/index.md)
- [Development Concepts](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/devlopment_concepts/index.md)
- [Error Handling](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/error_handling/index.md)
- [Coding Philosophies](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/philosophies_principles/index.md)
- [Posts](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/posts/index.md)
- [Study Guide](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/study_guide/index.md)
- [Styles](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/styles/index.md)
- [Tech Stacks](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/basics/tech_stacks/index.md)
- [Tips](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/tool_tip/tips/index.md)
- [Tools](https://locchh.github.io/sw-handbook/software/tool_tip/tools/index.md)
